title: my vanilla enhanced
description:
Hello

this mod is all about enhancing your vanilla experience , it doesn't change the game too much 

it only adds things that will make your vanilla a bit better and not tedious
body:
Hell this is my first mod

This mod adds 

The Ore Vein miner : which mines a full ore veins by pressing shift + mine

The Tree Feller : which again mines a whole by just pressing shift + mine

New Enchantment : Excavator which adds a new enchanment book thats make you mine a 3x3 area 

a New Block : Essence Collector that lets you extract XP from block around it
